titleStmt.title: SII 31.58: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 58. (A.R. No. B 327 of 1936.) TALAPANŪRU, KAMALAPURAM TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up in front of the ruined Śiva temple.
This is dated Śaka 1279, Śubhakṛit (the Cyclic year being Hēmaḷambi). Jyēshṭha, śu. 15, Thursday. The date of the record corresponds to June 2, Friday, 1357 A.D. f.d.t. °98.

Wornout. Registers some gifts of lands to the temple of Mūlasthāna-Mallināthadēva of Talpanūru by Aṅgabōla Nāyaka, for the merit of Voḍayalu Kaṁparāju, Queen [Maṁ]gadēvi ammagāru and also his parents Pēravu and Nāgasānamma, for maintaining the worship and offerings, while mahāmaṇḍalēśvara arirāya vibhāḷa, bhāsege tappuva rāyana gaṁḍḍa Vīra śrī [Sā]va[na]vōḍayalu was ruling the country.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . jayābhyudaya śrīśakavaruṣaṁbulu 12
79 Agunēṁṭi śubhakṛttu saṁvatsara jēṣṭha śudda 15 gu
śrīmaṁnmahāmaṁḍalēsva(śva)ra Arirāyavibhā
ḷabhāse(ṣe)gatappavarāyaragaṁḍḍa pūrvapaści
masamudrā dipatiyaina vīraśrīsā
vaṇavōḍayalu pridhvirājyaṁsēyu cu
ṁḍḍagānu talpanūranu Aṁgabhōna ba
nāyinigāru voḍayalu kaṁpparājuku
gādēvi Ammagārikiṁ tamataṁḍri pērapugānikiṁ
nni tamatalli nāgasānikiṁ puṇyamagānu tallunūri
mūlastānaṁ mallinātadēvaru Aṁgaraṁga bhōgālaku
gānu [Uri] tōṁṭanu Utta
10
pritti
This rest of the inscription is wornout.
Digital edition of SII 31.58 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
